publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-06-20 18:37:43 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Sex education, family life education, and child development pamphlets, broadsides, comics, and brochures designed for teenagers, pre-teens, and parents; issued by the American Social Hygiene Association, the American Social Health Association, F. E. Compton & Co., the Minnesota Dept. of Health, and others. Topics also include prostitution, sexually transmitted diseases, heterosexual dating, and marriage.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, June 2003Sarah Keen, October 2008

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Sex education, family life education, and child development pamphlets, broadsides, comics, and brochures designed for teenagers, pre-teens, and parents; issued by the American Social Hygiene Association, the American Social Health Association, F. E. Compton & Co., the Minnesota Dept. of Health, and others. Topics also include prostitution, sexually transmitted diseases, heterosexual dating, and marriage.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Sex instruction booklets, #7638. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Sexually transmitted diseases -- Prevention -- Study and teaching.
Sex instruction for youth.
Prostitution -- Study and teaching.
Menarche -- Study and teaching.
Marriage -- Study and teaching.
Dating (Social customs) -- Study and teaching.
Child development -- Study and teaching.
Adolescence -- Study and teaching.
